title: Wallet
subtitle: Track your balance, giving, spending, and time-credit activity.
communityFundDesc: Shared credits available for community support.
historySubtitle: Review earned, spent, and pending activity.
noTransactionsDesc: Your earned and spent time credits will appear here.
noFilteredTransactionsDesc: Try another filter to see more wallet activity.

actions.transferSubtitle: Search for a member, choose an amount, and send time credits securely.
actions.donateSubtitle: Support the community fund or send a donation to another member.
actions.validationAmount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
actions.validationInsufficient: You do not have enough time credits for this amount.
actions.searchFailedMessage: We could not search members right now. Please try again.
actions.transferSuccessMessage: Your time-credit transfer has been recorded.
actions.donationSuccessMessage: Thank you. Your donation has been recorded.
actions.mutationFailedMessage: We could not complete that wallet action.
actions.loadMoreFailedMessage: We could not load more transactions right now.
actions.exportSuccessMessage: Your transaction export has been prepared.
actions.exportNoDataMessage: There are no transactions to export yet.
